scenes.description: Remotion hero_title scene, brand palette mitti/brass/sindoor/bone, narration: In the akhada, every jorr counts. But who's counting?
Remotion text_card scene, brand palette mitti/brass/sindoor/bone, narration: You push through your set, and lose the count halfway.
Remotion callout scene, brand palette mitti/brass/sindoor/bone, narration: Jorr Counter watches you through your camera, and counts eve
Remotion comparison scene, brand palette mitti/brass/sindoor/bone, narration: Track your sets, take timed breaks, and share your scorecard
Remotion stat_card scene, brand palette mitti/brass/sindoor/bone, narration: No taps. No wearables. Just you, and your jorr.
Remotion hero_title scene, brand palette mitti/brass/sindoor/bone, narration: Desi Jorr Khana. Open it in your browser, and start counting
